name: python3-dfdatetime
title: python3-dfdatetime
summary: Digital Forensics date and time library for Python 3
description:
Digital Forensics date and time library for Python 3
dfDateTime, or Digital Forensics date and time, provides date and
time objects to preserve accuracy and precision.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dfdatetime because Digital Forensics date and time library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dfdatetime as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dfdatetime with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dfdatetime --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
